posts.title: 1032 Sharing
posts.text: To store English words, one method is to use linked lists and store a word letter by letter. To save some space, we may let the words share the same sublist if they share the same suffix. For example, loading and being are stored as showed in Figure 1. Figure 1 You are supposed to find the starting position of the common suffix (e.g. the position of i in Figure 1). Input Specification:Each input file contains one test case. For each case, the first line contains two addresses of nodes and a positive N (≤105), where the two addresses are the addresses of the first nodes of the two words, and N is the total number of nodes. The address of a node is a 5-digit positive integer, and NULL is represented by −1. Then N lines follow, each describes a node in the format: 1Address Data Next whereAddress is the position of the node, Data is the letter contained by this node which is an English letter chosen from { a-z, A-Z }, and Next is the position of the next node. Output Specification:For each case, simply output the 5-digit starting position of the common suffix. If the two words have no common suffix, output -1 instead. Sample Input 1:1234567891011111 22222 967890 i 0000200010 a 1234500003 g -112345 D 6789000002 n 0000322222 B 2345611111 L 0000123456 e 6789000001 o 00010 Sample Output 1:167890 Sample Input 2:1234500001 00002 400001 a 1000110001 s -100002 a 1000210002 t -1 Sample Output 2:1-1 分析：注意：测试点中有零散的结点 两次遍历，如果第二次遍历时，已经遍历过，输出 CODE：1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526#include <cstdio>const unsigned MAXSIZE=100000;struct node{ char data; int next; bool flag;};int main(){ node nodes[MAXSIZE]; int s1,s2,a,b,n; char data; scanf("%d %d %d",&s1,&s2,&n); for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) { scanf("%d %c %d",&a,&data,&b); nodes[a]={data,b,false}; } for (int i = s1; i !=-1 ; i=nodes[i].next) {nodes[i].flag= true;} for (int i = s2; i !=-1 ; i=nodes[i].next) { if (nodes[i].flag){ printf("%05d",i); return 0; } } printf("-1"); return 0;}
posts.author: HONGRRY

posts.title: 1044 Shopping in Mars
posts.text: Shopping in Mars is quite a different experience. The Mars people pay by chained diamonds. Each diamond has a value (in Mars dollars M$). When making the payment, the chain can be cut at any position for only once and some of the diamonds are taken off the chain one by one. Once a diamond is off the chain, it cannot be taken back. For example, if we have a chain of 8 diamonds with values M$3, 2, 1, 5, 4, 6, 8, 7, and we must pay M$15. We may have 3 options: Cut the chain between 4 and 6, and take off the diamonds from the position 1 to 5 (with values 3+2+1+5+4=15). Cut before 5 or after 6, and take off the diamonds from the position 4 to 6 (with values 5+4+6=15). Cut before 8, and take off the diamonds from the position 7 to 8 (with values 8+7=15). Now given the chain of diamond values and the amount that a customer has to pay, you are supposed to list all the paying options for the customer. If it is impossible to pay the exact amount, you must suggest solutions with minimum lost. Input Specification:Each input file contains one test case. For each case, the first line contains 2 numbers: N (≤105), the total number of diamonds on the chain, and M (≤108), the amount that the customer has to pay. Then the next line contains N positive numbers D1⋯D**N (D**i≤103 for all i=1,⋯,N) which are the values of the diamonds. All the numbers in a line are separated by a space. Output Specification:For each test case, print i-j in a line for each pair of i ≤ j such that Di + … + Dj = M. Note that if there are more than one solution, all the solutions must be printed in increasing order of i. If there is no solution, output i-j for pairs of i ≤ j such that Di + … + Dj >M with (Di + … + Dj −M) minimized. Again all the solutions must be printed in increasing order of i. It is guaranteed that the total value of diamonds is sufficient to pay the given amount. Sample Input 1:1216 153 2 1 5 4 6 8 7 16 10 15 11 9 12 14 13 Sample Output 1:12341-54-67-811-11 Sample Input 2:125 132 4 5 7 9 Sample Output 2:122-44-5 分析将所有子序列的和，构成一个矩阵 例： 5 132 4 5 7 9 矩阵中的数据是有一定的规律的，既从左到右，从下到上递增，可以按照这些数据的规律，寻找答案 由于数据最大有100000个，使用二维矩阵是很不理想的，或许上三角矩阵可以，当然可以模拟这个过程 代码实现12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546#include <cstdio>#include <vector>using namespace std;vector<int> res, sum;int main() { int n, m,temp; int k = 1; // 最接近目标的 1-k 序列 int min = 99999999; // 最接近目标的最小序列和 scanf("%d %d", &n, &m); sum.resize(n + 1); for (int i = 1; i <= n; ++i) { scanf("%d", &temp); sum[i] = sum[i - 1] + temp; // 保存 1-i 的序列和 if (sum[i]<m){ // 寻找最接近目标的序列和 k=i; } } /* sum[k]有两种情况，一种是小于目标值，一种是刚好等于目标值*/ if (sum[k] < m) { k++; // 小于的时候，不满足题目要求，需要一个比目标值大的数 } /* 1-k 的序列和最接近目标值*/ temp = min=sum[k]; int i = 1, j = k; while (i <= n && j <= n) { if (temp < m) { // 小于目标值，往右搜索 temp = sum[++j] - sum[i - 1]; continue; } /*有更合适的选择或者相同的选择*/ if (temp <= min) { if (temp < min) { // 有更合适的序列 更新 min = temp; res.clear(); } /*加入到结果集*/ res.push_back(i); res.push_back(j); } temp = sum[j] - sum[i++]; // 下移 } for (int t = 0; t < res.size(); t += 2) { printf("%d-%d\n", res[t], res[t + 1]); } return 0;}

posts.title: 1034 Head of a Gang
posts.text: One way that the police finds the head of a gang is to check people’s phone calls. If there is a phone call between A and B, we say that A and B is related. The weight of a relation is defined to be the total time length of all the phone calls made between the two persons. A “Gang” is a cluster of more than 2 persons who are related to each other with total relation weight being greater than a given threshold K. In each gang, the one with maximum total weight is the head. Now given a list of phone calls, you are supposed to find the gangs and the heads. Input Specification:Each input file contains one test case. For each case, the first line contains two positive numbers N and K (both less than or equal to 1000), the number of phone calls and the weight threthold, respectively. Then N lines follow, each in the following format: 1Name1 Name2 Time where Name1 and Name2 are the names of people at the two ends of the call, and Time is the length of the call. A name is a string of three capital letters chosen from A-Z. A time length is a positive integer which is no more than 1000 minutes. Output Specification:For each test case, first print in a line the total number of gangs. Then for each gang, print in a line the name of the head and the total number of the members. It is guaranteed that the head is unique for each gang. The output must be sorted according to the alphabetical order of the names of the heads. Sample Input 1:1234567898 59AAA BBB 10BBB AAA 20AAA CCC 40DDD EEE 5EEE DDD 70FFF GGG 30GGG HHH 20HHH FFF 10 Sample Output 1:1232AAA 3GGG 3 Sample Input 2:1234567898 70AAA BBB 10BBB AAA 20AAA CCC 40DDD EEE 5EEE DDD 70FFF GGG 30GGG HHH 20HHH FFF 10 Sample Output 2:10 分析： 团伙成员间可以抽象成一个图、每次通电权值都会更新 姓名字符串取hash值 DFS或者 CODE：12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546474849505152535455565758596061626364656667686970717273747576777879808182838485868788#include <iostream>#include <map>#include <queue>#define MAXSIZE 2000using namespace std;map<string, int> index; // 姓名 编号映射map<int, string> name;map<string, int> gang; // 团伙int num = 0;int G[MAXSIZE][MAXSIZE] = {0};int totalW[MAXSIZE] = {0};bool visited[MAXSIZE] = {false};int convert(string str) { if (index.find(str) != index.end()) { return index[str]; } else { index[str] = num; name[num] = str; return num++; }}void DFS(int s, int &head, int &cnt, int &total) { visited[s] = true; cnt++; if (totalW[s] > totalW[head]) { head = s; } for (auto i = index.begin(); i != index.end(); ++i) { if (G[s][i->second] != 0) { total += G[s][i->second]; G[s][i->second] = G[i->second][s] = 0; if (!visited[i->second]) DFS(i->second, head, cnt, total); } }}void BFS(int s, int &head, int &cnt, int &total) { queue<int> queue; bool flag[MAXSIZE] = {false}; queue.push(s); while (!queue.empty()) { s = queue.front(); if (totalW[s] > totalW[head]) head = s; queue.pop(); visited[s] = true; cnt++; for (auto i = index.begin(); i != index.end(); ++i) { if (!visited[i->second] && G[s][i->second] > 0) { total += G[s][i->second]; if (!flag[i->second]) { queue.push(i->second); flag[i->second] = true; } } } }}int main() { int n, k; scanf("%d %d", &n, &k); for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) { string tempA, tempB; int weight; cin >> tempA >> tempB >> weight; int indexA = convert(tempA); int IndexB = convert(tempB); totalW[indexA] += weight; totalW[IndexB] += weight; G[indexA][IndexB] += weight; G[IndexB][indexA] += weight; } // 遍历每一个人 for (auto i = index.begin(); i != index.end(); ++i) { if (!visited[i->second]) { int head = i->second, cnt = 0, total = 0; BFS(i->second, head, cnt, total); if (cnt > 2 && total > k) gang[name[head]] = cnt; } } printf("%d\n", gang.size()); for (auto i = gang.begin(); i != gang.end(); ++i) { cout << i->first << " " << i->second << endl; } return 0;}

posts.title: 1009 Product of Polynomials
posts.text: This time, you are supposed to find A×B where A and B are two polynomials. Input Specification:Each input file contains one test case. Each case occupies 2 lines, and each line contains the information of a polynomial: K N1 a**N1 N2 a**N2 … N**K aNK where K is the number of nonzero terms in the polynomial, N**i and aNi (i=1,2,⋯,K) are the exponents and coefficients, respectively. It is given that 1≤K≤10, 0≤N**K<⋯<N2<N1≤1000. Output Specification:For each test case you should output the product of A and B in one line, with the same format as the input. Notice that there must be NO extra space at the end of each line. Please be accurate up to 1 decimal place. Sample Input:122 1 2.4 0 3.22 2 1.5 1 0.5 Sample Output:13 3 3.6 2 6.0 1 1.6 题意：多项式乘法 分析： 首先多项式A的一项与多项式B的每一项相乘得到一个多项式C 然后多项式A的第二项与多项式B的一项相乘，结果插入到多项式C中 相乘后系数为零，不处理 找到插入位置，如果指数相等，那么系数相加 如果系数相加为零，舍去该项 如果插入位置在末尾，在末尾添加多项式 CODE：123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172737475767778798081828384858687888990919293949596979899100101102103104105106107//// Created by HONGRRY on 2021/1/28.//#include <iostream>using namespace std;typedef struct PolyNode *List;struct PolyNode { int exp; float cof; PolyNode *Next;};void readPoly(List &P);void printPoly(List P);void MultiPoly(List P1,List P2,List &P3);int main() { List P1,P2,P3; readPoly(P1); readPoly(P2); MultiPoly(P1,P2,P3); printPoly(P3->Next); return 0;}void readPoly(List &P){ int N; List Rear; P=(List)malloc(sizeof (PolyNode)); P->Next= nullptr; Rear=P; cin>>N; for (int i = 0; i < N; ++i) { List Temp=(List)malloc(sizeof (PolyNode)); scanf("%d %f",&Temp->exp,&Temp->cof); Temp->Next=Rear->Next; Rear->Next=Temp; Rear=Temp; } Rear=P; P=P->Next; free(Rear);}void printPoly(List P){ while (P){ printf("%d %.1f",P->exp,P->cof); P=P->Next; if (nullptr!=P) cout<<' '; } cout<<endl;}void MultiPoly(List P1,List P2,List &P3){ int count=0; P3=(List)malloc(sizeof (PolyNode)); P3->Next= nullptr; List TempA,TempB,TempC,Front; int i,exp; float cof; TempA=P1; TempB=P2; TempC=P3; // 初始化多项式C while (TempB){ exp=TempA->exp+TempB->exp; cof=TempA->cof*TempB->cof; List Temp=(List)malloc(sizeof (PolyNode)); Temp->exp=exp; Temp->cof=cof; Temp->Next=TempC->Next; TempC->Next=Temp; TempC=Temp; TempB=TempB->Next; count++; // 记录结果多项式的非零项数 } TempA=TempA->Next; while (TempA){ TempB=P2; while (TempB){ TempC=P3; cof=TempA->cof*TempB->cof; exp=TempA->exp+TempB->exp; if (cof==0) continue; // 寻找插入位置，如果指数系统需要相加，相加以后如果指数为零，要释放 while ((nullptr!=TempC->Next)&&(TempC->Next->exp>exp)){ TempC=TempC->Next; } if ((nullptr!=TempC->Next)&&TempC->Next->exp==exp){ TempC->Next->cof+=cof; if (TempC->Next->cof==0) {TempC->Next=TempC->Next->Next;count--;}; }else{ List Temp=(List)malloc(sizeof (PolyNode)); Temp->exp=exp; Temp->cof=cof; Temp->Next=TempC->Next; TempC->Next=Temp; count++; } TempB=TempB->Next; } TempA=TempA->Next; } printf("%d ",count);}

posts.title: 1010 Radix
posts.text: Given a pair of positive integers, for example, 6 and 110, can this equation 6 = 110 be true? The answer is yes, if 6 is a decimal number and 110 is a binary number. Now for any pair of positive integers N1 and N2, your task is to find the radix of one number while that of the other is given. Input Specification:Each input file contains one test case. Each case occupies a line which contains 4 positive integers: 1N1 N2 tag radix Here N1 and N2 each has no more than 10 digits. A digit is less than its radix and is chosen from the set { 0-9, a-z } where 0-9 represent the decimal numbers 0-9, and a-z represent the decimal numbers 10-35. The last number radix is the radix of N1 if tag is 1, or of N2 if tag is 2. Output Specification:For each test case, print in one line the radix of the other number so that the equation N1 = N2 is true. If the equation is impossible, print Impossible. If the solution is not unique, output the smallest possible radix. Sample Input 1:16 110 1 10 Sample Output 1:12 Sample Input 2:11 ab 1 2 Sample Output 2:1Impossible 题意：给定的数据中，前两个是需要比较的数，tag为1，表示第一个数是radix进制，tag为2，表示第二个数是radix进制 求一个数在最一个小进制下，与另一个数相等 分析： 将需要比较的数，转换成十进制比较 数据很大，会出现数据溢出 二分法进行寻找，注意转换为溢出为负数的情况，表明比需要比较的数值大 CODE：1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647484950515253545556575859//// Created by HONGRRY on 2021/1/29.//#include <iostream>#include <string>#include <cmath>#include <algorithm>#include <cctype>using namespace std;long long toDec(string N, long long D); // 转换成十进制long long find(string N, long long num); // 寻找int main() { string N1, N2; long long radix = 0, result; int tag; cin >> N1 >> N2 >> tag >> radix; result = tag == 1 ? find(N2, toDec(N1, radix)) : find(N1, toDec(N2, radix)); if (result != -1) { cout << result; } else { cout << "Impossible"; } return 0;}long long find(string N, long long num) { char ch = *max_element(N.begin(), N.end()); // 下界：寻找最大的一位，该数的进制至少是最大值+1 long long low = (isdigit(ch) ? ch - '0' : ch - 'a' + 10) + 1; long long high = max(num, low); // 上界 while (low <= high) { long long mid = low+((high-low)>>1); long long temp = toDec(N, mid); if (temp < 0 || temp > num) high = mid - 1; // 小于零，数据很大 else if (temp < num) low = mid + 1; else return mid; } return -1;}long long toDec(string N, long long D) { // 把任意进制转换成十进制 long long result = 0; int exp = 0; int temp = 0; for (auto it = N.rbegin(); it != N.rend(); it++) { char ch = *it; temp = isdigit(*it) ? *it - '0' : *it - 'a' + 10; result += temp *pow(D, exp++); } return result;}

posts.title: 1008 Elevator
posts.text: The highest building in our city has only one elevator. A request list is made up with N positive numbers. The numbers denote at which floors the elevator will stop, in specified order. It costs 6 seconds to move the elevator up one floor, and 4 seconds to move down one floor. The elevator will stay for 5 seconds at each stop. For a given request list, you are to compute the total time spent to fulfill the requests on the list. The elevator is on the 0th floor at the beginning and does not have to return to the ground floor when the requests are fulfilled. Input Specification:Each input file contains one test case. Each case contains a positive integer N, followed by N positive numbers. All the numbers in the input are less than 100. Output Specification:For each test case, print the total time on a single line. Sample Input:13 2 3 1 Sample Output:141 题意：计算电梯运行时间 分析： 初始化在一楼，序列输入结束以后，不用回到地面，但是停留的时间也要算进去 下一个编号大于当前楼号，上楼，（下一层楼层号-当前楼层号）*6+5； 下一个编号小于当前楼号，下楼，（当前楼层号-下一层楼层号）*4+5； 把上下楼花的时间加起来 CODE：1234567891011121314151617181920212223//// Created by HONGRRY on 2021/1/26.//#include <iostream>using namespace std;int main(){ int n,now=0,next; int totalTime=0; cin>>n; for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) { cin>>next; if (next>now){ totalTime+=(next-now)*6+5; now=next; } else{ totalTime+=(now-next)*4+5; now=next; } } cout<<totalTime; return 0;}

posts.title: 1001 A+B Format
posts.text: Calculate a+b and output the sum in standard format – that is, the digits must be separated into groups of three by commas (unless there are less than four digits). Input Specification:Each input file contains one test case. Each case contains a pair of integers a and b where −106≤a,b≤106. The numbers are separated by a space. Output Specification:For each test case, you should output the sum of a and b in one line. The sum must be written in the standard format. Sample Input:1-1000000 9 Sample Output:1-999,991 题意：计算两数的和，然后每三位以“ , ”为间隔输出 分析：整数转换为字符串处理，转置字符串，每次取三个字符加上“ , ”，后添加到结果串中 CODE：First Version1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526//// Created by HONGRRY on 2021/1/13.//#include <iostream>#include <string>using namespace std;int main(){ int a,b,c; bool isNegative= true; string Temp,Result; cin>>a>>b; c=a+b; if (c>=0) isNegative= false; c=abs(c); Temp=to_string(c); int i; for (i = 0; i +3< Temp.length(); i+=3) { Result+=Temp.substr(i,3)+','; } Result=Result+Temp.substr(i); if (isNegative) printf("-"); cout<<Result<<endl; return 0;} 题意是从尾部开始，进行分割，我的输出为 121000 0100,0 正确答案应该是 121000 01,000 Second Version1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132//// Created by HONGRRY on 2021/1/13.//#include <iostream>#include <string>#include <algorithm>using namespace std;int main() { int a, b, c,i; bool isNegative = true; string Temp, Result; cin >> a >> b; c = a + b; if (c >= 0) isNegative = false; // 标记是否为负数 c = abs(c); Temp = to_string(c); reverse(Temp.begin(), Temp.end()); // 转置 for (i = 0; i + 3 < Temp.length(); i += 3) { Result += Temp.substr(i, 3) + ','; } Result = Result + Temp.substr(i); reverse(Result.begin(), Result.end()); if (isNegative) cout<<'-'; cout << Result << endl; return 0;}

posts.title: 1003 Emergency
posts.text: As an emergency rescue team leader of a city, you are given a special map of your country. The map shows several scattered cities connected by some roads. Amount of rescue teams in each city and the length of each road between any pair of cities are marked on the map. When there is an emergency call to you from some other city, your job is to lead your men to the place as quickly as possible, and at the mean time, call up as many hands on the way as possible. Input Specification:Each input file contains one test case. For each test case, the first line contains 4 positive integers: N (≤500) - the number of cities (and the cities are numbered from 0 to N−1), M - the number of roads, C1 and C2 - the cities that you are currently in and that you must save, respectively. The next line contains N integers, where the i-th integer is the number of rescue teams in the i-th city. Then M lines follow, each describes a road with three integers c1, c2 and L, which are the pair of cities connected by a road and the length of that road, respectively. It is guaranteed that there exists at least one path from C1 to C2. Output Specification:For each test case, print in one line two numbers: the number of different shortest paths between C1 and C2, and the maximum amount of rescue teams you can possibly gather. All the numbers in a line must be separated by exactly one space, and there is no extra space allowed at the end of a line. Sample Input:123456785 6 0 21 2 1 5 30 1 10 2 20 3 11 2 12 4 13 4 1 Sample Output:12 4 题意：寻找两点间的最短路径，并且求这条路径上的点权 分析：求最短路径，Dijkstra算法的变形 CODE:123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172737475767778798081828384858687888990919293949596979899100101102103104105106107108109110111112113114115//// Created by HONGRRY on 2021/1/13.//#include <stdio.h>#include <stdlib.h>#define INFINITY 36575#define MAXSIZE 10001typedef struct GraphNode *MGraph;struct GraphNode { int Nv; int Ne; int G[MAXSIZE][MAXSIZE];};MGraph initGraph();void createGraph(MGraph Graph);void Dijkstra(MGraph Graph, int V, int Num[], int D);int main() { int C1, C2; int Num[MAXSIZE]; MGraph Graph = initGraph(); scanf("%d %d", &C1, &C2); for (int i = 0; i < Graph->Nv; i++) { scanf("%d", &Num[i]); } createGraph(Graph); Dijkstra(Graph, C1, Num, C2); return 0;}MGraph initGraph() { MGraph Graph = (MGraph) malloc(sizeof(struct GraphNode)); scanf("%d %d", &Graph->Nv, &Graph->Ne); for (int i = 0; i < Graph->Nv; i++) { for (int j = 0; j < Graph->Nv; j++) { Graph->G[i][j] = INFINITY; } } return Graph;}void createGraph(MGraph Graph) { int V1, V2, W; for (int i = 0; i < Graph->Ne; i++) { scanf("%d %d %d", &V1, &V2, &W); Graph->G[V1][V2] = W; Graph->G[V2][V1] = W; }}int findMinDist(int Dist[], int N, int Collected[]) { int V; int mindist = INFINITY; int result = -1; for (V = 0; V < N; V++) { if (Dist[V] < mindist && Collected[V] == 0) { mindist = Dist[V]; result = V; } } return result;}void Dijkstra(MGraph Graph, int V, int Num[], int D) { int W; int Collected[MAXSIZE]; int Dist[MAXSIZE]; int items[MAXSIZE]; int NUm_[MAXSIZE]; // 初始化 items[V] = Num[V]; for (int i = 0; i < Graph->Nv; i++) { Dist[i] = Graph->G[V][i]; if (Dist[i] < INFINITY) items[i] = items[V] + Num[i]; Collected[i] = 0; NUm_[i] = 1; } Dist[V] = 0; Collected[V] = 1; while (1) { W = findMinDist(Dist, Graph->Nv, Collected); if (W == -1) break; Collected[W] = 1; for (int i = 0; i < Graph->Nv; i++) { if (Collected[i] != 1 && Graph->G[W][i] < INFINITY) { if (Dist[W] + Graph->G[W][i] < Dist[i]) { Dist[i] = Dist[W] + Graph->G[W][i]; NUm_[i] = NUm_[W]; items[i] = items[W] + Num[i]; } else if (Dist[W] + Graph->G[W][i] == Dist[i]) { NUm_[i] += NUm_[W]; if (items[W] + Num[i] > items[i]) items[i] = items[W] + Num[i]; } } } } printf("%d %d", NUm_[D], items[D]);}

posts.title: 1006 Sign In and Sign Out
posts.text: At the beginning of every day, the first person who signs in the computer room will unlock the door, and the last one who signs out will lock the door. Given the records of signing in’s and out’s, you are supposed to find the ones who have unlocked and locked the door on that day. Input Specification:Each input file contains one test case. Each case contains the records for one day. The case starts with a positive integer M, which is the total number of records, followed by M lines, each in the format: 1ID_number Sign_in_time Sign_out_time where times are given in the format HH:MM:SS, and ID_number is a string with no more than 15 characters. Output Specification:For each test case, output in one line the ID numbers of the persons who have unlocked and locked the door on that day. The two ID numbers must be separated by one space. Note: It is guaranteed that the records are consistent. That is, the sign in time must be earlier than the sign out time for each person, and there are no two persons sign in or out at the same moment. Sample Input:12343CS301111 15:30:28 17:00:10SC3021234 08:00:00 11:25:25CS301133 21:45:00 21:58:40 Sample Output:1SC3021234 CS301133 题意：最早到的人开门，最晚离开的人锁门，找到这两个人 分析：每次输入，都将时间转换成秒，找到最小和最大的，并且记录对应的ID CODE：123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233//// Created by HONGRRY on 2021/1/14.//#include <stdio.h>#include <string.h>#define MAXSIZE 1001int main() { int n; int min = INT_MAX; int max = INT_MIN; char unlock[16], lock[16]; scanf("%d", &n); for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) { char temp[16]; scanf("%s", temp); int h1, m1, s1, h2, m2, s2; scanf("%d:%d:%d %d:%d:%d", &h1, &m1, &s1, &h2, &m2, &s2); int tempIn = h1 * 3600 + m1 * 60 + s1; int tempOut = h2 * 3600 + m2 * 60 + s2; if (tempIn < min) { strcpy(unlock, temp); min = tempIn; } if (tempOut > max) { strcpy(lock, temp); max = tempOut; } } printf("%s %s", unlock, lock); return 0;}
posts.author: HONGRRY

posts.title: 1004 Counting Leaves
posts.text: A family hierarchy is usually presented by a pedigree tree. Your job is to count those family members who have no child. Input Specification:Each input file contains one test case. Each case starts with a line containing 0<N<100, the number of nodes in a tree, and M (<N), the number of non-leaf nodes. Then M lines follow, each in the format: 1ID K ID[1] ID[2] ... ID[K] where ID is a two-digit number representing a given non-leaf node, K is the number of its children, followed by a sequence of two-digit ID‘s of its children. For the sake of simplicity, let us fix the root ID to be 01. The input ends with N being 0. That case must NOT be processed. Output Specification:For each test case, you are supposed to count those family members who have no child for every seniority level starting from the root. The numbers must be printed in a line, separated by a space, and there must be no extra space at the end of each line. The sample case represents a tree with only 2 nodes, where 01 is the root and 02 is its only child. Hence on the root 01 level, there is 0 leaf node; and on the next level, there is 1 leaf node. Then we should output 0 1 in a line. Sample Input:122 101 1 02 Sample Output:10 1 题意：输出每一层的叶子数 分析：注意要先计算层数后，在计算每一层叶子节点的个数 CODE：12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546474849505152535455565758596061626364//// Created by HONGRRY on 2021/1/13.//#include <stdio.h>#include <stdlib.h>#define MAXSIZE 101struct Node{ struct Node *Next; int Data;} Child[MAXSIZE];int LevelSize = 1;void countLevel(int root);int main(){ int Parent[MAXSIZE]; int n, m; scanf("%d %d", &n, &m); for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) { int p, c, k; scanf("%d %d", &p, &k); for (int j = 0; j < k; j++) { scanf("%d", &c); Parent[c] = p; struct Node *Temp = (struct Node *)malloc(sizeof(struct Node)); Temp->Data = NULL; Temp->Data = c; Temp->Next = Child[p].Next; Child[p].Next = Temp; } } Child[1].Data = 1; countLevel(1); for (int i = 1; i <= LevelSize; i++) { int count = 0; for (int j = 1; j <= n; j++) { if (Child[j].Data == i && Child[j].Next == NULL) count++; } printf("%d", count); if (i != LevelSize) printf(" "); } return 0;}void countLevel(int root){ for (struct Node *Temp = Child[root].Next; Temp != NULL; Temp = Temp->Next) { Child[Temp->Data].Data = Child[root].Data + 1; if (Child[Temp->Data].Data > LevelSize) LevelSize = Child[Temp->Data].Data; countLevel(Temp->Data); }}

posts.title: 1007 Maximum Subsequence Sum
posts.text: Given a sequence of K integers { N1, N2, …, N**K }. A continuous subsequence is defined to be { N**i, N**i+1, …, N**j } where 1≤i≤j≤K. The Maximum Subsequence is the continuous subsequence which has the largest sum of its elements. For example, given sequence { -2, 11, -4, 13, -5, -2 }, its maximum subsequence is { 11, -4, 13 } with the largest sum being 20. Now you are supposed to find the largest sum, together with the first and the last numbers of the maximum subsequence. Input Specification:Each input file contains one test case. Each case occupies two lines. The first line contains a positive integer K (≤10000). The second line contains K numbers, separated by a space. Output Specification:For each test case, output in one line the largest sum, together with the first and the last numbers of the maximum subsequence. The numbers must be separated by one space, but there must be no extra space at the end of a line. In case that the maximum subsequence is not unique, output the one with the smallest indices i and j (as shown by the sample case). If all the K numbers are negative, then its maximum sum is defined to be 0, and you are supposed to output the first and the last numbers of the whole sequence. Sample Input:1210-10 1 2 3 4 -5 -23 3 7 -21 Sample Output:110 1 4 题意：找到序列中子列和最大的序列，输出序列和及起始值和终止值 分析： 线性处理序列 如果更大就更新 如果小于0则抛弃 CODE：123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142#include <iostream>#include <vector>using namespace std;void maxSub(vector<int> arr);int main() { vector<int> arr; int n; cin >> n; arr.resize(n); for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) { cin >> arr[i]; } maxSub(arr); return 0;}void maxSub(vector<int> arr) { int maxStart, thisStart, maxEnd; int maxSum = -1, thisSum = 0; bool flag = true; for (int i = 0; i < arr.size(); ++i) { if (flag) { thisStart = i; flag = false; } thisSum += arr[i]; if (thisSum > maxSum) { maxSum = thisSum; maxStart = arr[thisStart]; maxEnd = arr[i]; } else if (thisSum < 0) { flag = true; thisSum = 0; } } if (maxSum >= 0) cout << maxSum << ' ' << maxStart << ' ' << maxEnd; else cout << 0 << ' ' << *arr.begin() << ' ' << *(arr.end() - 1);}

posts.title: 1005 Spell It Right
posts.text: Given a non-negative integer N, your task is to compute the sum of all the digits of N, and output every digit of the sum in English. Input Specification:Each input file contains one test case. Each case occupies one line which contains an N (≤10100). Output Specification:For each test case, output in one line the digits of the sum in English words. There must be one space between two consecutive words, but no extra space at the end of a line. Sample Input:112345 Sample Output:1one five 题意：给定一个字符串，将每一位数字相加求和，得到的结果每一位用英文单词输出 分析： 给定的数字很大，直接读入为字符串，再求和 将字符转换成数字，入栈 每次出栈输出对应的单词 CODE：123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930#include <stdio.h>char String[10][6] = {"zero", "one", "two", "three", "four", "five", "six", "seven", "eight", "nine"};int main() { char str[100]; int sum = 0; int Stack[4]; int Top = -1; scanf("%s", str); for (int i = 0; str[i] != '\0'; i++) { sum += str[i] - '0'; } if (sum == 0) printf("zero"); // 输出 else { while (sum > 0) { Stack[++Top] = sum % 10; sum /= 10; } while (Top >= 0) { printf("%s", String[Stack[Top]]); if (--Top >= 0) printf(" "); } } return 0;}
